headline: Inflation tops 4%, Fed pressure eases
detail: Sticky inflation above 4% is a direct headwind for high-multiple tech names like AVGO, PLTR, and CRWD — higher-for-longer rates compress valuations. Easing pressure on the Fed Chair signals policy may stay tight, which is the exact environment where your book struggles most.

headline: Jeremy Grantham: most expensive market in U.S. history
detail: Grantham's valuation warning reinforces the risk that a broad de-rating hits growth and tech hardest. With your book 90% concentrated in tech and chips — and on margin — a sentiment-driven selloff amplifies your drawdowns well beyond the index.

headline: Micron sinks after whipsaw week
detail: Micron weakness signals ongoing softness in semiconductor demand and sentiment. That bleeds directly into SMH and AVGO — your largest position is already down 16% and this kind of sector news removes a potential catalyst for recovery.

headline: SpaceX development could increase stock volatility
detail: You hold both SPCX (brand-new IPO, very limited trading history) and SPAL (2x leveraged SpaceX ETF). More volatility in the underlying is dangerous for a leveraged product with decay — SPAL especially can move hard and fast against you.
